data.content: Implementation review passed. All 14 e2e tests pass across cli_loom_prompt_resolution.rs (9 tests, 330 lines) and cli_loom_profile_output.rs (5 tests, 433 lines). All 8 acceptance criteria verified: default workflow Loom prompts, claim output, profile-specific output, multi-workflow coexistence, regression diagnostics for non-Loom fallback and unresolved templates, and 95.39% coverage. make sanity green. Minor non-blocking observation: assert_loom_prompt/assert_no_unresolved_templates duplicated between test files.
